import { getEntityCache, type GoblEntityData } from "gobl-utils-ts";

import AccountBase from "./base/AccountBase";

export default class Account extends AccountBase {
	constructor(data?: GoblEntityData) {
		super(data, "Account", Account.PREFIX, [...Account.COLUMNS]);
	}

	public static fromCache(key: string): Account | undefined {
		const cache = getEntityCache<Account>("Account");
		return cache && cache.get(key);
	}

	//====================================================
	//=     Your custom implementation goes here
	//====================================================
}
